query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_queries,
  SUM(CASE WHEN qualityScore >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as high_quality_count,
  SUM(CASE WHEN qualityScore >= 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as high_quality_percentage,
  AVG(qualityScore) as avg_quality,
  MIN(qualityScore) as min_quality,
  MAX(qualityScore) as max_quality
FROM queries
WHERE qualityScore IS NOT NULL;
